explored_directions.description: Profile-as-Memory — persistent multi-layered project profile that auto-captures from NoPilot workflow outputs
explored_directions.differentiator: Auto-captures intent from structured workflow, no manual curation
explored_directions.risk: Profile quality depends on Agent summarization ability

explored_directions.description: Scan-on-Demand — no persistent profile, scan codebase fresh each time
explored_directions.risk: High per-scan cost, cannot capture 'why', only 'what'
explored_directions.abandonment_reason: Cannot capture architectural intent; high repeated cost for medium/large projects

explored_directions.description: Hybrid — lightweight profile for intent + on-demand scanning for structure
explored_directions.differentiator: Profile stores only hard-to-infer info, structure is always real-time
explored_directions.risk: Boundary between 'what to persist' and 'what to scan' may be unclear

decision_log.detail: Selected Hybrid direction: intent persisted in profile (experimental L2), code structure scanned on-demand. Combined from Direction 1 (Profile-as-Memory) and Direction 3 (Hybrid), with user's clarification that intent and structure should be stored separately.
User refined direction: intent capture as experimental feature flag, code structure as stable feature. Not two separate flows but one flow with per-stage triggers.
All 14 features (F1-F14) kept. No cuts or deferrals. User accepted all correctness challenges (REQ-005 complexity, REQ-007 LLM imprecision, REQ-013 intent quality uncertainty) as ACCEPT_COST.
User corrected SCENARIO-003: first-time onboarding of existing codebase must not treat feature-level philosophy as project-level. Added two-dimensional intent detection (profile × code).

User rejected dual-flow architecture. Greenfield and brownfield share one flow with per-stage trigger/mode branching. discover.json retained as working artifact per flow run, profile is long-term memory updated after build.
15 requirements (REQ-001 through REQ-015), 5 invariants (INV-001 through INV-005), 3 scenarios approved. All completeness dimensions >= 70%.

gaps_noted: Profile staleness handling added after initial assessment
Large codebase scanning threshold added after initial assessment
